questions: What is the duration of diarrhea in days?
Does the patient have any signs of severe illness (Temperature > 38.5 °C, abdominal pain, bloody diarrhea, >6 stools/24 hrs, dehydration)? (Yes/No)
Is the patient immunocompromised (e.g., AIDS, post-transplantation)? (Yes/No)
If yes to rehydration, is the dehydration mild to moderate? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have very ill symptoms with systemic symptoms associated with bloody diarrhea? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have amoebic dysentery? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have acute giardiasis? (Yes/No)
